text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, November 24. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
